segments.text: O Lord God of vengeance, O God of vengeance, shine forth!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Rise up, O judge of the earth; repay to the proud what they deserve!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: O Lord, how long shall the wicked,
how long shall the wicked exult?
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: They pour out arrogant words;
all the evildoers boast.
segments.speaker: Wicked

segments.text: They crush your people, O Lord, and afflict your heritage.
They kill the widow and the sojourner, and murder the fatherless;
and they say,
The Lord does not see; the God of Jacob does not understand.
segments.speaker: Wicked

segments.text: Understand, O dullest of the people!
Fools, when will you be wise?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: He who planted the ear, does he not hear? He who formed the eye, does he not see?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: He who disciplines the nations, does he not rebuke? He who teaches man knowledge,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: the Lord—knows the thoughts of man, that they are but a breath.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Blessed is the man whom you discipline, O Lord, and whom you teach out of your law,
to give him rest from days of trouble, until a pit is dug for the wicked.
For the Lord will not forsake his people; he will not abandon his heritage;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: for justice will return to the righteous, and all the upright in heart will follow it.
Who rises up for me against the wicked? Who stands up for me against evildoers?
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: If the Lord had not been my help, my soul would soon have lived in the land of silence.
When I thought, 'My foot slips,' your steadfast love, O Lord, held me up.
When the cares of my heart are many, your consolations cheer my soul.
Can wicked rulers be allied with you, those who frame injustice by statute?
They band together against the life of the righteous and condemn the innocent to death.
But the Lord has become my stronghold, and my God the rock of my refuge.
He will bring back on them their iniquity and wipe them out for their wickedness; the Lord our God will wipe them out.
segments.speaker: God
